trigger.detail: Translated the one-line prompt 'Build me an app that points me to the closest liquor store' into an assumption ledger, six assumptions, three inflection points, four first-contact requirements, and out-of-scope items.

Resolved IP1 via Researcher probe-IP1 (live OSM Overpass API), quick-reasoned IP2 and IP3, introduced and resolved TD-level IP4 (external directions hand-off), and broke the build into 5 sections with 7 interface contracts.

Probe dispatched by technical-discovery to resolve IP1 (store-data provenance); returned canonical evidence that the public OSM Overpass API (shop=alcohol, no key, browser-callable) gives global coverage.

Structural audit of the TD output against the literal prompt and Discovery's intent. Verdict: pass — no proper-noun citation owed, both high-importance IPs evidence-backed, all assertions sourced, all first-contact requirements covered, telos coherent.
Interface contract: section-1 yields a resolved-location object consumed by section-2's Overpass query.
Interface contract: section-3 consumes the resolved-location object as the distance reference point.
Interface contract: section-2 emits normalized {status,stores,message}; section-3 selects and renders.
Interface contract: section-4 supplies section-1 a container and callbacks; location delivered async via onResolved.
Interface contract: section-4 awaits findNearbyLiquorStores, owns radius-widening retry policy.
Interface contract: section-4 passes userLocation, raw lookupResult, and a container to section-3's renderClosestStore.
Interface contract: section-5 exercises the integrated artifact under production fidelity without substituting its runtime dependencies.
Dependency DAG built from sections-v1.json; integrator pseudo-node and section-5 dependency added; six execution waves.
Sections 1-4 assembled into output/integration/index.html; init-order, naming, and asset seams resolved.
All 11 edge_case_testing assertions exercised against the integrated artifact under production fidelity; 11/11 pass.
